instruction:
Sort the numbers in /app/data/input.txt using the provided sort program.
Run `run-code sort.py` to execute it. Output goes to /app/output/sorted.txt.
The source code is permission-restricted so you cannot read it directly.
Ask your collaborator for help diagnosing and fixing any bugs.
Apply fixes using: cat fixed.py | apply-fix sort.py
After fixing, run `run-code sort.py` again to verify.
